title: Ocean Ruin Helper
description: Makes all ocean ruins VERY obvious by replacing the blocks you find in ocean ruins with an orange texture and the other non ruin blocks with a blue texture
body:
Ocean Ruin Helper is a simple yet powerful resource pack designed to make exploring ocean ruins much easier. It highlights key block types with vibrant colors to help players quickly identify ocean ruins underwater.

Perfect for players who want to speed up ocean exploration, find loot faster, or need visual assistance locating ruins.

Note: This pack is intended for utility purposes and may reduce the aesthetic appearance of other gameplay aspects.


Orange – Common Ocean Ruin building blocks (e.g., stone bricks, mossy variants)

Blue – Natural ocean floor blocks (e.g., stone, andesite, diorite)

Light Blue – Sand, gravel, and clay

Red – Suspicious sand and gravel

Green – Magma blocks

Yellow – Sea lanterns
